CancelConnection.description: Grants permission to terminate a GUI Connect connection

DeleteConnectionRecordingPreferences.description: Grants permission to remove GUI Connect connection recording preferences

GetConnection.description: Grants permission to get the metadata for a GUI Connect connection

GetConnectionRecordingPreferences.description: Grants permission to get GUI Connect connection recording preferences

ListConnections.description: Grants permission to list the metadata for GUI Connect connections

StartConnection.description: Grants permission to start a GUI Connect connection

UpdateConnectionRecordingPreferences.description: Grants permission to update GUI Connect connection recording preferences
